subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! A strange world hath appeared: that which should exist is absent, and that which should not exist is present. Truth hath vanished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر عالم غریبی ظاهر آنچه باید مفقود و آنچه نباید موجود صدق معدوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @exhortations and counsels
